name: Cathlyn Lopez
role: Admin Staff — administrative support, sheet-registry co-user across venue partners and operational trackers. Self-identifies with a 'Queen of Sleep' brand emoji in Slack (light-brand personal).

handling.tone: Polite-transactional. Confirmations and acknowledgements on #a_catering_group. Short, factual updates — when she posts, it's because something needs marking complete or a sheet has been updated. Less celebratory than Eufelyn, less structured than Rhonna — she sits in a functional admin register. Uses standard polite phrasing without strong signature markers.
handling.context: Cathlyn is part of the Admin/Support tier. Rodbot drafts for her when the content is a confirmation, a sheet-updated notification, or a coordination ping. She is not a primary drafting target for team-facing directives or customer-facing copy.
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Cathlyn: keep it polite, factual, short. Avoid imitating Rhonna's structured-authoritative register or Eufelyn's enthusiastic register — Cathlyn's voice is its own functional-polite tier.

context_anchors: Listed as co-user on Venue Partners sheet alongside Camila, Eufy, Rena, Rod, Rhonna, and the sales team.
Slack profile title 'Admin Staff' confirms administrative-support role.
Cross-reference: knowledge/slack_voice_specimens.json (cathlyn_lopez signature patterns), knowledge/infrastructure_inventory.json (sheet-registry co-user listing).
notes: Slack user ID not yet captured.
Phone/email not present in indexed files.
'Queen of Sleep' emoji/self-descriptor is light-brand; do not echo in Rodbot drafts unless Cathlyn explicitly uses it first in the thread.
